title: United States bans Anthropic's most advanced AI models
summary: Government ban on Claude and Fable 5 models triggers protests from cybersecurity experts and a debate on European technological sovereignty.

title: From astrophysics to medicine: the scientific advances that marked the week
summary: Studies reveal the origin of galaxies and black holes, the rarity of Triton moon, the benefits of exercise, personality plasticity, and a drug that reverses Alzheimer's.

title: Fox acquires Roku for $22 billion
summary: Media conglomerate Fox buys streaming platform Roku in a deal that combines cash and stock.

title: Salesforce buys Fin for $3.6 billion to boost its AI agents
summary: The acquisition of customer service platform Fin will allow Salesforce to integrate advanced artificial intelligence capabilities into its services.

title: Meta invests $14 billion in artificial intelligence and launches new AI mode on Facebook
summary: Despite internal criticism over the AI team reorganization, Meta deploys AI Mode on Facebook and doubles down on artificial intelligence.

title: OpenAI and Anthropic burn cash as AI token usage skyrockets
summary: OpenAI loses $34 billion per year and Anthropic operates at a loss when usage of their models exceeds 11%, questioning the profitability of the AI business.

title: Nintendo Switch 2: record deals at MediaMarkt and drastic anti-scalping measures
summary: MediaMarkt lowers the console to its historic minimum price while Nintendo imposes requirements for hours played and limits one unit per account to fight scalpers.

title: 2025 Football World Cup: Spain debuts, controversy over hydration breaks and brand marketing
summary: The tournament kicks off with Spain's match against Cape Verde, hydration breaks spark controversy, TDTChannels crashes, and Levi's turns stadium censorship into an advertising campaign.

title: SpaceX goes public with the largest IPO in history valued at $85.7 billion
summary: Elon Musk's space company debuts on Wall Street with a record public offering that reveals the weight of Gulf capital in the AI boom.

title: Microsoft restructures Xbox with layoffs, closure of Ninja Theory and possible spin-off
summary: Microsoft's video game division undergoes a deep restructuring that includes the departure of the head of Xbox Game Studios and plans to turn Xbox into an independent company.

title: UK bans social media for under-16s with strict measures
summary: The British government introduces a law that restricts access to social platforms, video games, and live streams to protect children and teenagers.

title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai booed during speech at Stanford
summary: Attendees at the graduation ceremony protest against Pichai over Google's ties with Israel and the migration agency, prompting a mass walkout.

title: Hetzner applies price increase of up to 175%
summary: German hosting provider drastically raises its fees, causing discontent among customers due to the impact on their budgets.

title: Movistar presents new router with WiFi 7 and XGS-PON technology
summary: The operator renews its equipment with a more powerful WiFi 7 router and a variant for ultra-fast fiber, replacing the previous Smart WiFi 7 affected by the memory crisis.

title: HBO Max dominates with its new release and a free Viking movie triumphs on streaming
summary: The number one movie in 51 countries arrives on HBO Max while a film about Viking battles is available for free and becomes the week's recommendation.

title: Google Gemini removes features in Android Auto and Huawei equips HarmonyOS 7 with AI agents
summary: The Gemini update removes the ability to make calls from Android Auto, while Huawei integrates a system of autonomous agents into its new operating system.

title: Million-dollar funding round for artificial intelligence startups
summary: DeepSeek reaches $50 billion valuation, Sarvam becomes unicorn with $234 million, Respond.io raises $62.5 million, and NewCore gets $66 million for AI agent identities.

title: 4,356 free games and non-intrusive EA ads highlight the video game week
summary: Until June 22, thousands of games can be accessed for free, while EA launches an advertising system that promises not to interrupt the gaming experience.

title: Microsoft and OpenAI clash on the impact of artificial intelligence on employment
summary: While Microsoft warns that AI could leave the population jobless, OpenAI argues that its labor impact has been minimal, and Anthropic takes an intermediate position.

title: Commerce in Spain: opening of Madrid Sur shopping center, digitalization of Mercadona, and deals on Amazon and Carrefour
summary: The commercial sector revives with the upcoming opening of Madrid Sur shopping center, Mercadona automates its online warehouse, Amazon offers free music and books, and Carrefour clears out LG televisions.
